exploration_notes:
The W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 mode needs to be added following the pattern of W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 and W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8. Key changes span:

**Python enums & mode mapping**: `tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py` (QuantAlgo enum + QuantMode IntFlag + from_quant_algo/from_description). The Python FP4GemmType in `tensorrt_llm/quantization/utils/fp4_utils.py` may need a new variant.

**C++ enums & mode mapping**: `cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h` (QuantMode bit flag + hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8 + fromDescription
